'''Tray'la Sheek''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] who was an agent of the so-called "[[Freedom Convoy]]," and was affiliated with [[Eela Valotta]] during the waning years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], she was wanted by [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] for kidnapping several Twi'leks from the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt's]] personal harem. The [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] was claimed by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
